data.name: CreateGame.ServerMaintenance
data.value: The server is under maintenance. Please come back later.

data.name: CreateGame.AdminAiHint
data.value: Admin: 1-3 AIs with human, or 1-4 AIs without human.

data.name: CreateGame.AiSoloRequired
data.value: Select one AI to start a solo game.

data.name: CreateGame.AiOnlyMinTwo
data.value: Choose at least 2 AIs for AI-only mode.

data.name: CreateGame.LanguageRequired
data.value: Select at least one game language.

data.name: CreateGame.AiUniqueHint
data.value: 0 to 3 AI slots. A selected bot cannot be used in another slot.

data.name: Density.Description
data.value: Choose a compact display to reduce spacing or a normal display for more comfort.

data.name: Density.Help
data.value: Compact mode hides the board rack and shows it in the sidebar, with larger tiles and reduced spacing.

data.name: Downloads.MainCommandsSubtitle
data.value: The essential commands to start playing.

data.name: Downloads.Subtitle
data.value: Lightweight native client for Windows, Linux and macOS.

data.name: Downloads.Why.Offline
data.value: Offline — Play without a connection in local mode (JSON).

data.name: Downloads.Why.Online
data.value: Online — Connect to the server with

data.name: Downloads.Why.Scriptable
data.value: Scriptable — Embed in shell scripts, CI, automations.

data.name: Documentation.Subtitle
data.value: Learn how to play, use the CLI, or contribute to the project.

data.name: Documentation.Playing.Desc
data.value: Master the rules and strategies of Playalama.

data.name: Documentation.CLI.Desc
data.value: Play in local or online mode via the terminal.

data.name: Documentation.CLI.Point3
data.value: Play in local or online mode

data.name: Documentation.Dev.Desc
data.value: Explore the source code and contribute to the project.

data.name: Contact.Discord.Desc
data.value: Join our Discord community to discuss strategy, report bugs, or just chat with other players!

data.name: Contact.Email.Desc
data.value: For private questions, partnerships, or any request, write to us directly. We reply quickly.

data.name: Contact.GitHub.Desc
data.value: Found a bug or have a feature idea? Open an issue on our GitHub repository.

data.name: Contact.Community.Desc
data.value: Playalama is a community project. Your feedback helps us improve the game!

data.name: Contact.Community.Point1
data.value: Share your strategies and best moves

data.name: Contact.Community.Point2
data.value: Help translate the game into your language

data.name: Footer.Tagline
data.value: The free, cross-platform tactical word game. Play on the Web or via command line.

data.name: Game.Check.Title
data.value: Check the word and calculate score without playing

data.name: Game.End.ServerRestartMessage
data.value: The game was interrupted by a server restart. Your score has been saved.

data.name: Game.End.NotFoundMessage
data.value: Game not found — the server may have been restarted.

data.name: Game.HowTo.Step1
data.value: Drag a tile from your rack onto the board (or use arrow keys then your letters).

data.name: Game.HowTo.Step2
data.value: The first word must pass through the center star ★.

data.name: Game.RackHint
data.value: Drag your tiles onto the board

data.name: Tooltip.CenterStar
data.value: Starting square — your first word must pass through here.

data.name: Tooltip.Check
data.value: Calculates your move score without playing it.

data.name: Tooltip.Validate
data.value: Validates your word. The first word must pass through the center ★.

data.name: Game.JokerAssignHint
data.value: Assign a letter to each joker (★ → click)

data.name: Game.RedirectLobby
data.value: The game has not started yet. Redirecting to lobby…

data.name: Game.Suggest.None
data.value: No suggestions found for this rack.

data.name: Game.SuggestionsUsedNotice
data.value: A suggestion was used: this game no longer counts towards Elo ranking (except Tournament mode).

data.name: Game.Suggest.Use.Title
data.value: Pre-fill the form with this word

data.name: GameModes.ReadySubtitle
data.value: Start a game now or download the CLI client.

data.name: Games.Empty
data.value: No active games. Create the first one!

data.name: Games.Subtitle
data.value: Create or join an online game.

data.name: Games.ContinueOrNew
data.value: Resume a game or create a new one below.

data.name: Home.Cta.Badges
data.value: ✓ Free · ✓ No ads · ✓ Open source · ✓ Cross-platform

data.name: Home.Cta.Subtitle
data.value: Free, ad-free, and no tracking. Start a game in under 10 seconds.

data.name: Home.Cta.Title
data.value: Ready to place your first tile?

data.name: Home.Hero.Subtitle
data.value: Playalama reinvents word games: dynamic board, bonuses/penalties, online multiplayer, and CLI.

data.name: Home.Modes.Subtitle
data.value: From clean classic to the wildest variants — every game is unique.

data.name: Home.Modes.Title
data.value: One game, a thousand ways to play

data.name: Home.Why.Elo.Text
data.value: ELO ranking per game mode. Climb and become a legend.

data.name: Home.Why.Languages.Text
data.value: French, English, and German for both interface and dictionary.

data.name: Home.Why.NoTracking.Text
data.value: No ads and no third-party cookies. Your privacy comes first.

data.name: Home.Why.OpenSource.Text
data.value: Source code available on GitHub. Contribute, fork, customize.

data.name: Home.Why.Responsive.Text
data.value: Optimized for tablet, and desktop with light/dark themes.

data.name: Home.Why.WebCli.Text
data.value: Play from your browser or terminal with no installation.

data.name: Leaderboard.Subtitle
data.value: See the rankings of all players.

data.name: License.Subtitle
data.value: Playalama is distributed under the AGPLv3 free license.

data.name: Lobby.CancelTitle
data.value: Closes the game for everyone and returns to the game list

data.name: Lobby.CopyInviteTitle
data.value: Copies the lobby URL to invite players

data.name: Lobby.NotJoined
data.value: You haven't joined this game yet.

data.name: Lobby.ShareCode
data.value: Share the code below to invite players.

data.name: Lobby.WaitHostStart
data.value: Waiting for the host to start the game…

data.name: Login.Subtitle
data.value: Find your games and your ranking.

data.name: Modes.2v2.FullDesc
data.value: Two teams of two players share a single team score.

data.name: Modes.2v2.ShortDesc
data.value: Team up with a partner against another duo.

data.name: Modes.blitz.FullDesc
data.value: In Blitz mode, every second counts: maximize score under time pressure.

data.name: Modes.blitz.ShortDesc
data.value: 5-minute countdown. Score as much as possible before the buzzer.

data.name: Modes.chaos.FullDesc
data.value: Chaos mode introduces unstable rules and dramatic score swings.

data.name: Modes.chaos.ShortDesc
data.value: Penalty tiles and board bombs. Pure survival.

data.name: Modes.classique.FullDesc
data.value: Classic mode is the core Playalama experience: 15x15 board, 7 tiles, and letter/word bonuses.

data.name: Modes.classique.ShortDesc
data.value: Revisited Scrabble. 15x15 board, 7 tiles, multi-language dictionary.

data.name: Modes.grand-plateau.FullDesc
data.value: A longer, richer format with more board space and dynamic events.

data.name: Modes.grand-plateau.ShortDesc
data.value: 21x21 board with special zones and random events.

data.name: Modes.solo-ia.FullDesc
data.value: Training mode to improve against the Playalama AI.

data.name: Modes.solo-ia.ShortDesc
data.value: Challenge an adaptive AI with 5 difficulty levels.

data.name: Modes.classique.Rules.3
data.value: DL, TL, DW, TM bonus squares

data.name: Modes.classique.Rules.5
data.value: Game ends when the bag is empty and a player places all tiles

data.name: Modes.blitz.Rules.1
data.value: Individual timer per player (5, 10 or 25 min)

data.name: Modes.blitz.Rules.3
data.value: First player to reach 0 loses by forfeit

data.name: Modes.blitz.Rules.4
data.value: Tiles in hand are not subtracted from the score

data.name: Modes.blitz.Rules.5
data.value: Suggestions allowed but Elo is not counted

data.name: Modes.solo-ia.Rules.3
data.value: AI adapts its level to your performance

data.name: MyGames.LoginRequired
data.value: You must be logged in to see your history.

data.name: Profile.LoginRequired
data.value: You must be logged in to access this page.

data.name: Register.Subtitle
data.value: Email is optional — it's not used to log in.

data.name: Routes.NotFound.Text
data.value: The requested route does not exist.

data.name: Rules.Section.Common.Intro
data.value: The fundamentals that apply to all game modes.

data.name: Rules.Section.Common.R0.Text
data.value: The board consists of normal squares and bonus squares: ×2 letter (DL), ×3 letter (TL), ×2 word (DW), ×3 word (TW). The center square is a DW.

data.name: Rules.Section.Common.R1.Text
data.value: Each tile bears a letter and a point value. Rare letters (Z, K, X…) are worth more. The blank tile (joker) is worth 0 points but can represent any letter.

data.name: Rules.Section.Common.R2.Text
data.value: A word must connect to at least one tile already on the board (except on the first turn). It must be present in the dictionary of the chosen language.

data.name: Rules.Section.Common.R3.Text
data.value: Drag and drop a tile from your rack to an empty square on the board. You can also click a tile to select it then click the target square. Tiles placed this turn can be moved or taken back as long as the move hasn't been submitted. Hovering over a square highlights the target.

data.name: Rules.Section.Common.R4.Text
data.value: Click the board to activate keyboard mode. Use the arrow keys ↑↓←→ to move the cursor, type a letter to place it, Tab to toggle direction (→ horizontal / ↓ vertical), Delete to remove a tile placed this turn, Insert to leave an intentional gap between two tiles, Backspace to undo the last letter, Escape to take back all tiles from the current turn.

data.name: Rules.Section.Common.R5.Text
data.value: All accepted words come from the Wiktionary (via Kaikki). Proper nouns, place names and abbreviations are excluded. Conjugated forms and common nouns are accepted.

data.name: Rules.Section.Common.R6.Text
data.value: In the CLI, a lowercase letter in the play move command forces the use of the joker. On the Web, a button lets you designate the joker.

data.name: Rules.Section.Common.R7.Text
data.value: You can swap up to 7 tiles for tiles from the bag, but it counts as a turn (0 points).

data.name: Rules.Section.Common.R8.Text
data.value: The game ends when the bag is empty and a player places all their tiles, or when all players pass twice in a row. Remaining tiles in hand are subtracted from the score.

data.name: Rules.Section.Common.R9.Text
data.value: Several aids are available during games: move suggestions (play.suggest), move verification before playing (play.check), simulation, hints (show.hints) and dictionary search (dict.check, dict.search, dict.anagram). Dictionary search is allowed and encouraged in all modes. Other aids (verification, simulation, hints) are restricted to Casual mode.

data.name: Rules.Section.Common.R10.Text
data.value: Using a suggestion during a game disables Elo rating updates for that game (except in Tournament mode). The game still counts as played, but your Elo rating is not affected. Other aids (verification, simulation, hints) have no impact on Elo but are only available in Casual mode.

data.name: Rules.Section.Common.R11.Text
data.value: At any time, you can select any word to display its definition, synonyms and a link to Wiktionary, if available. This feature is available in all modes, with no impact on ranking.

data.name: Rules.Section.Classique.R0.Text
data.value: 15×15, 7 tiles in hand, bag of 102 tiles (FR), 2–4 players.

data.name: Rules.Section.Classique.R1.Text
data.value: The first word must pass through the center square (H8).

data.name: Rules.Section.Classique.R2.Text
data.value: Placing all 7 tiles in a single turn earns a 50-point bonus.

data.name: Rules.Section.Classique.R3.Text
data.value: Words must belong to the dictionary of the selected language (FR, EN, DE).

data.name: Rules.Section.Blitz.R0.Text
data.value: Each player has a limited time: 5, 10 or 25 minutes. The timer counts down thinking time on each turn.

data.name: Rules.Section.Blitz.R1.Text
data.value: The first player to reach 0 seconds loses by forfeit. The game ends immediately.

data.name: Rules.Section.Blitz.R2.Text
data.value: When a player reaches 0, scores are tallied. Tiles in hand are not subtracted.

data.name: Rules.Section.Blitz.R3.Text
data.value: Move suggestions are allowed, but using a suggestion disables Elo rating updates for that game.

data.name: Rules.Section.Blitz.R4.Text
data.value: Blitz mode feeds the OpenRanked queue (Open Elo), like Standard and Competitive modes.

data.name: Rules.Section.SoloIa.Intro
data.value: Perfect your game against the AI.

data.name: Rules.Section.SoloIa.R0.Text
data.value: 5 levels: Beginner (plays short words), Intermediate, Advanced, Expert, Legendary (uses anticipation strategies).

data.name: Rules.Section.SoloIa.R1.Text
data.value: The Legendary AI adapts to your playstyle over time.

data.name: Rules.Section.SoloIa.R2.Text
data.value: End of game: analysis of your missed words, improvement suggestions.

data.name: Rules.Section.Team.R0.Text
data.value: 2 teams of 2 players. The score is the sum of both partners' scores.

data.name: Rules.Section.Team.R1.Text
data.value: Order alternates between teams: Team A (P1) → Team B (P1) → Team A (P2) → Team B (P2).

data.name: Rules.Section.Team.R2.Text
data.value: A private team chat is available during the game (not visible to opponents).

data.name: Rules.Section.Team.R3.Text
data.value: ⚠️ This mode will be available soon.

data.name: Rules.Section.GrandPlateau.Intro
data.value: Epic games on an expanded space.

data.name: Rules.Section.GrandPlateau.R0.Text
data.value: 21×21 squares. More room for long-distance strategies.

data.name: Rules.Section.GrandPlateau.R1.Text
data.value: Mobile bonus zones appear and disappear over the course of the turns.

data.name: Rules.Section.GrandPlateau.R2.Text
data.value: Every 5 tiles placed, an event may occur: doubling a zone, cancelling a word, surprise bonus…

data.name: Rules.Section.GrandPlateau.R3.Text
data.value: ⚠️ This mode will be available soon.

data.name: Rules.Section.Chaos.Intro
data.value: When the board becomes a minefield.

data.name: Rules.Section.Chaos.R0.Text
data.value: Some tiles in the bag have a negative value. You can only see their type after placing them.

data.name: Rules.Section.Chaos.R1.Text
data.value: Some letters on the board explode if a word includes them, removing adjacent tiles.

data.name: Rules.Section.Chaos.R2.Text
data.value: At random intervals, an area of the board is destroyed and its tiles go back into the bag.

data.name: Rules.Section.Chaos.R3.Text
data.value: A score can drop below zero — including for the final winner.

data.name: Rules.Section.Chaos.R4.Text
data.value: ⚠️ This mode will be available soon.

data.name: Admin.Subtitle
data.value: User management, games management and server monitoring.

data.name: Admin.TerminateAllDesc
data.value: Immediately terminates all active in-memory games (players receive a game.ended event).

data.name: Admin.DrainDesc
data.value: Maintenance mode: prevents new games from being created. Active games are not affected.

data.name: Admin.DrainStartedMessage
data.value: Maintenance mode enabled. {0} game(s) still in progress.

data.name: Admin.DrainStoppedMessage
data.value: Maintenance mode disabled. Game creation is available again.

data.name: Status.AccessDeniedText
data.value: Your account lacks admin rights, or your session expired.

data.name: Status.LoginText
data.value: Log in to access the admin panel.

data.name: Status.Subtitle
data.value: Health and stats of the Lama stack in real time.

data.name: Accessibility.BoardScaleHelp
data.value: Adjust board size from 0.8x to 2.0x for better readability.

data.name: Accessibility.FontSizeDescription
data.value: Adjust text size for the entire interface.

data.name: Accessibility.FontSizeHelp
data.value: Use A+ and A- to adjust, or choose a preset.

data.name: Accessibility.InfoContrast
data.value: Optimal color contrast (WCAG AAA) for high contrast theme

data.name: Accessibility.InfoColorBlind
data.value: 3 specialized themes for different types of color blindness

data.name: Accessibility.InfoKeyboard
data.value: Full keyboard navigation with visible focus

data.name: Accessibility.InfoText
data.value: These settings improve Playalama accessibility for all users.

data.name: Accessibility.PageDescription
data.value: Customize Playalama accessibility to your needs.

data.name: Accessibility.ThemeHelp
data.value: Choose a theme suited to your visual needs.

data.name: Accessibility.ThemesDescription
data.value: Choose a visual theme suited to your needs.

data.name: GameModes.ComingSoonDesc
data.value: This mode will be available soon. Stay tuned!

data.name: GameModes.ComingSoonTooltip
data.value: This mode will be available soon

data.name: License.Summary
data.value: Summary: if you modify the software and redistribute it — or run it as a network service — you must make the corresponding source code available under the same license.

data.name: License.DonationsDesc
data.value: Donations to fund infrastructure are compatible with AGPLv3. The license does not block monetization, but requires that modified versions remain free under AGPL.

data.name: License.DevToolsDescSuffix
data.value: (or any other IDE) does not affect the AGPL license of the produced code. The IDE license is independent.

data.name: License.LexicalCreditsDescPrefix
data.value: Lexical data (lemmas, definitions, synonyms) is imported from the

data.name: License.InventoryNote
data.value: Inventory based on NuGet dependencies of the repository. Verify the official notices of each project for legal audits.
